note_main_file: id=2 Improved Fireball (spec_tree=-1) — flags=[1,0,8] confirmed. SCOPE NOTE: mask2=8 is a shared MAGE marker bit (see note_shared_mask2_bit3). With [1,0,8], the CASTING_TIME FLAT modifier also matches Frostfire Bolt, Pyroblast, PoM, Arcane Power, and Evocation via mask2=8. Instant-cast spells (PoM, AP) are unaffected; Frostfire Bolt and Pyroblast will also have cast time reduced. Acceptable scope — cross-tree affix, verified=true.

id=4 'Empowered Fireball' (spec_tree=-1) — REVISED: renamed to 'Empowered Fire', flags corrected to [4194305,4096,0] (Fireball|FrostfireBolt|Pyroblast unique bits, mask2 dropped), max_rank corrected 5→3, value_per_rank corrected 2→5. See main-file patch.
_notes.note_shared_mask2_bit3: mask2 bit3 (=8) is a SHARED MAGE marker bit on: Fireball, FrostfireBolt, Pyroblast, PoM, Arcane Power, Evocation. Combined-flag entries always drop mask2 to avoid false matches.
_notes.note_no_other_shared_bits: All Fire/Frost spell unique bits in mask0/mask1 are distinct. No exclusions required beyond dropping mask2.

confirmed_flags.Fireball_133: [1,0,8] = mask0 bit0 (0x00000001) + shared mask2 bit3 — from main-file id=2 (verified=true)

computed_combined_flags.Incineration_FB_Scorch: [18,0,0] — FireBlast mask0_bit1(2)|Scorch mask0_bit4(16). No shared bits.
computed_combined_flags.EmpoweredFire_Fireball_FFB_Pyro: [4194305,4096,0] — Fireball mask0_bit0(1)|Pyroblast mask0_bit22(4194304)|FFB mask1_bit12(4096). mask2 dropped.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Fire Blast
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2,0,0]=mask0 bit1 (0x00000002). Fire Blast(2136) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_MAGE. No shared MAGE marker bits. Fire Blast cooldown -2s/rank (COOLDOWN FLAT: -2000ms). WotLK: 2r at -2/-4s.

talent_affixes._todo: Ignite (5r, tier 1) — When your fire spell crits, the target burns for 20/40/60/80/100% of crit bonus damage over 4 sec. Proc-based DoT, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Incineration
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[18,0,0]=0x00000012. OR of FireBlast(2136) mask0 bit1(2)|Scorch(2948) mask0 bit4(16). No shared bits between these two spells. Fire Blast and Scorch crit chance +2%/rank (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT: 200 = 2%). WotLK: 2r at +2/+4%.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Fireball
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[1,0,8]. mask2=8 is the shared MAGE marker bit — the CASTING_TIME modifier also matches FrostfireBolt, Pyroblast via mask2=8, but instant-cast spells are unaffected. Acceptable scope. Fireball cast time -100ms/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Pyrogenics (2r, tier 2) — Fire spells reduce target's fire resistance by 5/10. Debuff mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Critical Mass
talent_affixes.notes: All-ones — Fire spell sub-family not isolatable via SpellMod (no confirmed shared Fire-only bit). Acceptable scope for Fire spec affix. Carrier Fireball(133) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_MAGE. All Mage spell crit chance +2%/rank (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT: 200 = 2%). WotLK: 3r at +2/+4/+6%.

talent_affixes.name: Playing with Fire
talent_affixes.notes: All-ones — Fire spell sub-family not isolatable via SpellMod; all-ones is accepted scope for Fire spec affix. Carrier Fireball(133) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_MAGE. All Mage spell damage +1%/rank (DAMAGE PCT: 1). WotLK: 3r at +1/+2/+3%.

talent_affixes._todo: Pyromaniac (3r, tier 4) — When you crit with fire spells 3 times in a row, reduces mana cost by 9/18/27% until you cast a non-crit. Proc/conditional, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Empowered Fire
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[4194305,4096,0]. OR of: Fireball(133) mask0 bit0(1)|Pyroblast(11366) mask0 bit22(4194304)|FrostfireBolt(44614) mask1 bit12(4096). mask2=8 dropped from all three spells to avoid shared-bit contamination. Carrier Fireball(133) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_MAGE. Fireball, Pyroblast, and Frostfire Bolt damage +5%/rank (DAMAGE PCT: 5). WotLK talent: 3r at +5/+10/+15%. NOTE: corrects main-file id=4 which had wrong name ('Empowered Fireball'), flags ([1,0,8] covering only Fireball), max_rank(5→3), and value_per_rank(2→5).

talent_affixes._todo: Firestarter (2r, tier 6) — Scorch and Flamestrike reduce cast time of next Flamestrike by 0.5/1s. Proc-based cast time conditional, not implementable as flat SpellMod.
Dragon's Breath (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

Burnout (5r, tier 7) — Increases fire crit chance by 1/2/3/4/5% but crits consume 5/10/15/20/25% of base mana. Mixed passive stat + drawback — not modeled to avoid half-implementing a drawback talent.
Improved Hot Streak (2r, tier 7) — Increases the chance to trigger Hot Streak by 33/66%. Proc rate modifier, not implementable as SpellMod.
Molten Fury (2r, tier 7) — Increases damage against targets below 35% health by 4/8%. Conditional (target HP threshold), not implementable as flat SpellMod.
Blazing Speed (2r, tier 8) — 13/26% chance when hit to gain 150% movement speed for 1.5 sec. Proc-based on being hit, not implementable as SpellMod.
Hot Streak (3r, tier 8) — After 2 consecutive non-periodic fire crits, next Pyroblast is instant. Proc chain mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.
Living Bomb (1r, tier 9) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
